scope_goal: Describe the actual branch-head recovery fix and remove the stale docs-only alignment story.

vision_capabilities: Capability 3 - Auditable generation through deterministic recovery and rewrite behavior for persisted local state.
kickoff_budget_note: Handoff metadata aligned to the reviewed feature commit; approved non-owned test coverage requires SCOPE_ALLOW_SHARED=1.
